# The Trade Desk MCP Starter Kit

> The Trade Desk programmatic campaigns

This repository provides pre-configured MCP (Model Context Protocol) configuration files 
for managing The Trade Desk with AI agents in Amp, Cursor, VS Code, and Claude Desktop.

The MCP server is hosted at mcp.syntermedia.ai — no installation required.

## Quick Start
1. Get API key: https://syntermedia.ai/developer
2. Set SYNTER_API_KEY environment variable
3. Open this repo in your AI editor
4. Start chatting with your agent

## Documentation
- https://syntermedia.ai/manual
- https://github.com/Synter-Media-AI/mcp-server

## Available Tools
140+ tools for campaign management, analytics, creative generation, audience sync, and conversion tracking across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, Reddit, TikTok, X, Microsoft, Amazon, Spotify, and The Trade Desk.
